nasb.text: Many, O Lord my God, are the wonders which You have done, And Your thoughts toward us; There is none to compare with You. If I would declare and speak of them, They would be too numerous to count.

esv.text: You have multiplied, O Lord my God, your wondrous deeds and your thoughts toward us; none can compare with you! I will proclaim and tell of them, yet they are more than can be told.

cnv.text: 耶和華我的　神啊！ 你所行的奇事，並你向我們所懷的意念很多， 沒有人可以和你相比； 如果我要述說陳明， 也多到不能勝數。

ccb.text: 我的上帝耶和华啊， 你行了许多奇事， 为我们定了许多美好的计划， 谁能与你相比！ 你奇妙的作为不可胜数。

csbs.text: 耶和华我的神哪， 你所行的奇妙作为和你向我们所怀的意念甚多， 没有人能与你相比； 即使我要宣告述说， 也数不胜数！
